title: 克服恐惧。
titleOriginal: Overcome a fear.

title: 向你冤枉的人道歉或弥补。
titleOriginal: Apologize or make amends with someone you’ve wronged.

title: 阻止自己给自己找借口。
titleOriginal: Stop yourself from giving an excuse.

title: 把手机关掉一天。
titleOriginal: Turn off your phone for a day.

title: 度过没有抱怨或消极情绪的一天。
titleOriginal: Go a day without complaining or negativity.

title: 对某人诚实而不是怀恨在心。
titleOriginal: Be honest with someone instead of holding a grudge.

title: 做一些稍微超出你的舒适区的事情。
titleOriginal: Do something slightly outside your comfort zone.

title: 完成一些你已经推迟了太久的事情。
titleOriginal: Get something done that you’ve put off doing for a bit too long.

title: 尝试一些你舒适区之外的事情。
titleOriginal: Try something outside your comfort zone.

title: 通过心理健康帮助热线与某人交谈。
titleOriginal: Talk to someone through a mental health helpline.

title: 去看心理健康专家。
titleOriginal: See a mental health professional.

title: 去户外待一会儿。
titleOriginal: Spend some time outdoors.

title: 捡起户外看到的垃圾。
titleOriginal: Pick up some litter outside.

title: 探索您所在地区的小径或路径。
titleOriginal: Explore a trail or path in your area.

title: 花一些时间在当地的公园或海滩。
titleOriginal: Spend some time in a local park or beach.

title: 给阳台和室内的植物浇水。
titleOriginal: Water the plants both on the balcony and indoors.

title: 做一些园艺或庭院工作。
titleOriginal: Do some gardening or yard work.

title: 种一棵树。
titleOriginal: Plant a tree.

title: 放风筝。
titleOriginal: Fly a kite.

title: 在花园里种植蔬菜。
titleOriginal: Plant vegetables in a garden.

title: 沿着自行车道或小径骑自行车。
titleOriginal: Go biking down a bike path or trail.

title: 夏天住在营地。
titleOriginal: Stay at a camp in the summer.

title: 去露营吧。
titleOriginal: Go camping.

title: 冬天在小木屋里露营。
titleOriginal: Camp in a cabin in the winter.

title: 去划船吧。
titleOriginal: Go boating.

title: 在火上做饭。
titleOriginal: Cook a meal over a fire.

title: 钓鱼。
titleOriginal: Go fishing.

title: 种植一些您所在地的原生花卉。
titleOriginal: Plant some flowers that are native to your location.

title: 睡在外面开阔的天空下。
titleOriginal: Sleep outside under the open sky.

title: 练习射箭。
titleOriginal: Practice archery.

title: 去滑冰吧。
titleOriginal: Go ice skating.

title: 生篝火。
titleOriginal: Make a campfire.

title: 至少种植五棵树。
titleOriginal: Plant at least five trees.

title: 去骑马吧。
titleOriginal: Go horseback riding.

title: 去洞穴探险/洞穴探险。
titleOriginal: Go spelunking/caving.

title: 冬天去露营。
titleOriginal: Go camping in the winter.

title: 去攀岩或沿绳下降。
titleOriginal: Go cliff climbing or abseiling.

title: 去滑翔吧。
titleOriginal: Go hang-gliding.

title: 去白水漂流。
titleOriginal: Go white water rafting.

title: 去攀冰吧。
titleOriginal: Go ice climbing.

title: 去水肺潜水吧
titleOriginal: Go scuba diving.

title: 爬一座山。
titleOriginal: Climb a mountain.

title: 至少读完一本书的一章。
titleOriginal: Read at least one chapter of a book.

title: 阅读有关激励您的人的故事。
titleOriginal: Read about somebody that inspires you.

title: 参观图书馆。
titleOriginal: Visit a library.

title: 向某人借一本书。
titleOriginal: Borrow a book from someone.

title: 阅读励志人物的传记。
titleOriginal: Read a biography of someone inspirational.

title: 借书给某人。
titleOriginal: Lend a book to someone.

title: 读完一本书。
titleOriginal: Finish reading a book.

title: 向图书馆或慈善机构捐赠书籍。
titleOriginal: Donate books to a library or goodwill.

title: 听有声读物。
titleOriginal: Listen to an audiobook.
